ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "lanvin_size" TEXT /* Proprietary size of the fashion brand */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size equivalent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest_measurement" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist_measurement" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip_measurement" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement for the size */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance allowed for the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, France, UK, Germany, Italy, USA, Denmark) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "shipping_costs" REAL /* Default shipping costs for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_sizes" (
  "region_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_size" TEXT /* Size for the specific region (e.g., 34, 36, 38, 40, 42) */,
  "chest_measurement" REAL /* Chest measurement for the region size */,
  "waist_measurement" REAL /* Waist measurement for the region size */,
  "hip_measurement" REAL /* Hip measurement for the region size */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement for the region size */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the region size */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance allowed for the region size measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer, more detailed description of the clothing type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer, more detailed description of the style */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of purchase */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order item (quantity * price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "preferred_style" TEXT /* Preferred style of the customer */,
  "preferred_clothing_type" TEXT /* Preferred clothing type of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
